title: Cheaper Shulkers
description: Shulkers now have a new crafting recipe so that you won't have to go to the end just to get shulkers.
body:
Do you ever find yourself needing to carry more items than can fit in your inventory but don't have a shulker box or access to the End dimension?

Now, thanks to this mod, you don't need to go to the End anymore. 

This mod introduces a new crafting recipe for shulker boxes. To craft a shulker box, simply surround a chest with eight obsidian blocks. 

The original crafting recipe is still available for those who prefer not to mine all the obsidian.

Made a discord you can join if you want [https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC](https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC)
